title: petalostylis cassioides
intro: Petalostylis cassioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the lemon scented ironwood. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as a treatment for fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Petalostylis cassioides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
